module.exports = "

Variables

\n\n

A variable is like a box. You can put something in the box and take it out.

\n\n\n
    \n
  • var box
    • \n
  • box = \"cat\"
    • \n
  • box
    • \n
\n\n

You can define as many variables are you need

\n\n
    \n
  • var bin
    • \n
  • bin = \"toy\"
    • \n
  • bin
    • \n
\n\n

and then call those variables again

\n\n
    \n
  • box
    • \n
  • bin
    • \n
\n\n

You can put another thing in your variable

\n\n
    \n
  • box = \"dog\"
    • \n
  • box
    • \n
\n\n

What's in the bin?

\n

What's in the box?

\n"
